# cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_instance_families (Data Source)

Used to retrieve all Public Cloud VM Instances instance families of the tenant.

To query this datasource you will need the `public_cloud_vm_instances_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve all instance families of the tenant.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_instance_families" "all" {}

output "family_names" {
  value = [for f in data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_instance_families.all.instance_families : f.name]
}

# Per-family priced billing SKUs (vCPU and RAM).
output "family_skus" {
  value = {
    for f in data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_instance_families.all.instance_families :
    f.name => f.skus
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `instance_families` (List of Object) The list of instance families. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--instance_families))

<a id="nestedatt--instance_families"></a>
### Nested Schema for `instance_families`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `ram_max_gb` (Number)
- `ram_min_gb` (Number)
- `skus` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--instance_families--skus))
- `vcpu_max` (Number)
- `vcpu_min` (Number)

<a id="nestedobjatt--instance_families--skus"></a>
### Nested Schema for `instance_families.skus`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `description_en` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `price` (Number)
- `unit` (String)
